items.title: Claude · @claudeai
items.description: Claude uses your connected apps first: Slack, Calendar, and other integrations. When there's no connector for the tool you need, it asks for your permission to open the app on your screen directly. https://t.co/19b6sl6irI

items.description: Pretty much every PR I review: 0) review <URL> [codex does it's thing and finds issues] 1) is the issue clear? [if not, trash PR] 2) is this the best possible fix? [95% of the time no] 3) continue discussion, consider tradeoffs, usually re…
